---
title: "Session 09 teaching notes: Python 6"
session_id: session-09
event_id: null
---

## Session 9 — For and while loops

See [for_demo.py](../materials/session_09/for_demo.py)

Loop: explain with sum/product \sum_i^n

p. 110/111: nr 3-4, 6-7 homework

while exercises:
nr 1: homework
nr 2-4: in-session
nr 5-6: homework
-> remind: nr 6 same task as in Excel


Explain loop mechanics with sums and products, then distinguish the planned in-class and homework exercises.

## Exercises

| Page(s) | Exercise      | Summary                                                                                                                                    | Files                                                                                                                | In-class / take-home |
| ------: | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------- |
| 110–111 | `for` loops   | Repeat messages, calculate an average, identify multiples, generate Fibonacci numbers and random frequencies, and print a letter triangle. | `Message.py`<br>`Average.py`<br>`Tens.py`<br>`MultipleSum.py`<br>`Fibonacci.py`<br>`Frequencies.py`<br>`Triangle.py` |                      |
| 113–114 | `while` loops | Build a shopping list, implement two guessing games, extend the dice game, and generate a loan-repayment history.                          | `ShoppingList.py`<br>`Guess1.py`<br>`Guess2.py`<br>`Dicegame2.py`<br>`Loan.py`                                       |                      |

## Pages 110–111 — `for` loops

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class demo]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-demo} [`../materials/session_09/for_demo.py`](../materials/session_09/for_demo.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-demo}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/for_demo.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_09/Message.py`](../materials/session_09/Message.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/Message.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_09/Average.py`](../materials/session_09/Average.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/Average.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_09/Tens.py`](../materials/session_09/Tens.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/Tens.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_09/MultipleSum.py`](../materials/session_09/MultipleSum.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/MultipleSum.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_09/Fibonacci.py`](../materials/session_09/Fibonacci.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/Fibonacci.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_09/Frequencies.py`](../materials/session_09/Frequencies.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/Frequencies.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_09/Triangle.py`](../materials/session_09/Triangle.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/Triangle.py >}}
```

- Explain loops using a sum and a product:

```text
sum:     Σᵢⁿ
product: ∏ᵢⁿ
```

- Assign exercises 3–4 and 6–7 as homework.

::: {.teaching-break}
☕ Break — 10 minutes
:::

## Pages 113–114 — `while` loops

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_09/ShoppingList.py`](../materials/session_09/ShoppingList.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/ShoppingList.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_09/Guess1.py`](../materials/session_09/Guess1.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/Guess1.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_09/Guess2.py`](../materials/session_09/Guess2.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/Guess2.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_09/dicegame2.py`](../materials/session_09/dicegame2.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/dicegame2.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_09/Loan.py`](../materials/session_09/Loan.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_09/Loan.py >}}
```

- Assign exercise 1 as homework.
- Complete exercises 2–4 in class.
- Assign exercises 5–6 as homework.
- Remind students that exercise 6 is the same task they completed in Excel.

## Summary and announcements

- TODO

::: {.callout-tip title="Notes for improvement"}
Take notes on improvements and common questions during the session and add them to `feedback.qmd` afterwards.
:::
